blocks.html: A for loop repeats code a set number of times. range(5) means "count 0, 1, 2, 3, 4".

blocks.starter:
for i in range(5):
    print("Count:", i)
blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: You can loop through a list of items directly, printing something for each one.

blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: A while loop keeps going as long as something stays true. Be careful — always change something inside so it can stop!

blocks.starter:
countdown = 3
while countdown > 0:
    print(countdown)
    countdown = countdown - 1
print("Blast off! 🚀")
blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Use a for loop and range() to print a star pattern: print one more "*" on each line, for 5 lines. Hint: try print("*" * i).
